allow: PowerShell($app = Get-ChildItem -Path app -Recurse -File | Measure-Object; $src = Get-ChildItem -Path src -Recurse -File | Measure-Object; "app files: $\($app.Count\)"; "src files: $\($src.Count\)"; "--- top-level dirs in app ---"; Get-ChildItem -Path app -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; "--- top-level dirs in src ---"; Get-ChildItem -Path src -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
